command: f=$1; case "$f" in "$PWD"/*) f=${f#"$PWD"/};; esac; bash scripts/lint-markdown.sh --fix "$f"

if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then shfmt -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$1"; else f=$1; case "$f" in "$PWD"/*) f=${f#"$PWD"/};; esac; docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --env HOME=/tmp --volume "$PWD:/workspace" --workdir /workspace mvdan/shfmt:v3.11.0 -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$f"; fi
